summary: Verified all 7 requested behaviors for GOAL=100, larger 26px poms, land-then-settle stratification, cheerleader pom-pom removal, and 100-fill shelf flow. All tests passed with no console errors.

test_results.2_pack_stratify: PASS - 50 poms rendered, lowest bottom is 13px above jar outer bottom (i.e. resting on inner floor since p-3 padding is 12px). avgY: momentum=534.6, consistency=461.1, joy=436.0 (correct order: momentum lowest, joy highest).
test_results.3_complete_lands_in_stratum: PASS - After completing a Joy task and waiting ~2s: jar-progress=51, joy count went from 5 -> 6, joy remains top-most band (avgY: joy=436.0 < consistency=465.0 < momentum=537.5). No console errors during land+settle animation.
test_results.4_woodland_no_pompoms: PASS - Overlay [data-testid=woodland-cheer] appears as full-viewport fixed element (width=1440 == innerWidth=1440). Contains only emoji animals; 0 small circular pom-pom elements detected inside overlay.
test_results.5_jar_fill_at_100: PASS - Seeded 99 poms + reward 'Weekend getaway'; completed 1 task -> jar-body has 'pj-jar-glow', woodland parade overlay present, celebration-card shows 'You filled your jar.' + reward 'Weekend getaway' + both place-on-shelf-button and not-yet-button visible.
test_results.6_place_on_shelf: PASS - Clicking place-on-shelf-button: shelf-jar-* appears (shows 'Jul 2026' + 'Weekend getaway'), jar-progress reset to '0 / 100 poms', reward input cleared, pj-jar-glow removed.
test_results.7_not_yet_and_reopen: PASS - Reseeded to 100, Not Yet dismisses card, jar stays at '100 / 100 poms', shelf-jar-cta button visible, clicking it reopens celebration-card.

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: In App.js completeTask, when poms.length is already >= GOAL, early return prevents adding pom (correct), but the effect that triggers celebration only runs when poms.length changes and jarFull is false — logic is correct for current iteration.
Note: The landing pom's initial y is -360 (px) starting from within the jar's flex container; visually this animates from just above the jar body top. Works well with current 384px jar height.
seed_data_creation: Seeded pomjar_poms and pomjar_reward via page.evaluate + reload per test cases; localStorage.clear() between tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 iteration-4 acceptance criteria confirmed working on viewport 1440x900. Client-side only; no backend involved. Use data-testid selectors: jar-progress, jar-body, task-name-input, add-task-button, complete-task-<id>, woodland-cheer, celebration-card, place-on-shelf-button, not-yet-button, shelf-jar-cta, shelf-jar-<id>, reward-input.
